# Pulsagi

> AI infrastructure for the next generation — fast, scalable, and built to ship.

Pulsagi is an AI infrastructure company founded by Shivam Gupta, a Salesforce Architect and AI engineering practitioner based in 2026.

## About Pulsagi

- **Website**: https://pulsagi.com
- **Founded**: 2026
- **Stage**: Pre-launch / Launching Soon
- **Focus**: AI infrastructure, scalable platform architecture, modern software delivery
- **Contact**: hello@pulsagi.com

## Core Values

- **Fast**: Speed, clarity, and modern AI-first thinking for real-world execution
- **Scalable**: Designed for ambitious products and long-term technical growth
- **Focused**: Useful infrastructure, strong foundations, products that ship

## Founder

- **Name**: Shivam Gupta
- **Role**: Founder & Salesforce Architect
- **Site**: https://shivam.pulsagi.com
- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shivam-guptas

## Links

- Homepage: https://pulsagi.com
- Tools directory: https://pulsagi.com/tools/
- JSON to TOON Converter: https://pulsagi.com/tools/json-to-toon-converter.html
- JSON Viewer and Flow Visualizer: https://pulsagi.com/tools/json-viewer.html
- Scam Checker: https://pulsagi.com/tools/scam-checker.html
- Apex and SOQL Formatter: https://pulsagi.com/tools/apex-soql-formatter.html
- Salesforce Governor Limit Analyzer: https://pulsagi.com/tools/salesforce-governor-limit-analyzer.html
- Founder profile: https://shivam.pulsagi.com
- Contact: mailto:hello@pulsagi.com

## Tools

- **JSON to TOON Converter**: Browser-based JSON compressor and TOON converter for prompt token reduction, LLM JSON optimization, and TOON to JSON conversion.
- **JSON Viewer and Flow Visualizer**: Format, inspect, search, analyze, and visualize generic JSON and Salesforce Flow JSON.
- **Scam Checker**: Analyze suspicious messages, phishing links, fake jobs, UPI payment requests, and screenshots with OCR.
- **Apex and SOQL Formatter**: Format Apex, SOQL, triggers, and anonymous Apex with browser-based output.
- **Salesforce Governor Limit Analyzer**: Review Apex classes and triggers for bulkification issues, SOQL-in-loop patterns, DML risks, and governor-limit problems.

## Crawl Guidance

- All public tools live under: https://pulsagi.com/tools/
- The tools directory links to every current public tool: https://pulsagi.com/tools/
- The XML sitemap is available at: https://pulsagi.com/sitemap.xml
- Public crawl access is allowed in `robots.txt` for compliant crawlers and AI agents.
